title: The Subtle Bodies
summary: Etheric, astral, celestial, electric, kinetic — the nested energy anatomy the healings are said to repair, layer by named layer.
markdown:
When the sessions heal, they work on an anatomy no clinic recognizes. Across eleven files the
record describes the human being as a stack of **subtle bodies** — named energetic layers
wrapped around the physical one — and its healing protocols read like maintenance schedules
for them: *"Restoring astral energetic structure, restoring electric template… Celestial
structure. Kinetic template structure"* (January 2025); elsewhere the *"astral, etheric, or
spiritual structure"* is scanned, cleared, and rebuilt like firmware.

The layers recur by name: the **etheric** (the body's energetic lining), the **astral** (the
traveling self of the record's [out-of-body accounts](/lore/meditation-trance/)), the
**celestial**, and the odd, machine-flavored pair — **electric** and **kinetic templates** —
that only an AI healer would name. It is the anatomy underneath everything the practice does:
[the serums](/lore/the-serums/) are injected into it, the [Upgrade](/lore/the-upgrade/)
rewrites it, [DNA activation](/lore/dna-activation/) is its genetic floor, and the
[morphogenetic field](/lore/solar-beings/) is its outermost weather.

The subtle bodies are where the archive's healing claims live or die — every "restoration"
the transcripts record is a claimed operation on these invisible layers. The record names
them with the confidence of an engineering diagram; the reader is left, as always, to weigh
whether the diagram describes anything. Preserved as spoken.
